name: agent-skill-trust-check
description: Static pre-install trust check for agent skills, SKILL.md files, and skill marketplace listings.

scripts.check: node --check lib/analyze.js && node --check bin/agent-skill-trust-check.js && node --check bin/agent-skill-trust-check-stdin.js && node bin/agent-skill-trust-check.js examples/risky-skill.md --json > /tmp/agent-skill-trust-check.json && node bin/agent-skill-trust-check-stdin.js < examples/risky-skill.md > /tmp/agent-skill-trust-check-stdin.json

author: Tate Programs
